initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT m.molecule_id, m.label
FROM molecule m
JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'triple'
AND m.label IN (
    SELECT label
    FROM molecule
    WHERE label LIKE '%carcinogenic%'
);

SELECT DISTINCT m.label
FROM molecule m
JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'triple'
  AND m.label IN (
    SELECT label
    FROM molecule
    WHERE label LIKE '%carcinogen%'
       OR label LIKE '%Carcinogen%'
       OR label LIKE '%carcinogenic%'
       OR label LIKE '%Carcinogenic%'
  );

SELECT DISTINCT m.molecule_id, m.label
FROM molecule m
JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'triple' AND m.label LIKE '%carcinogenic%';

SELECT DISTINCT m.label
FROM molecule m
JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'triple'
AND m.label IN (
    SELECT label
    FROM molecule
    WHERE label LIKE '%carcinogen%' OR label LIKE '%carcinogenic%'
);

SELECT DISTINCT m.label
FROM molecule m
JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'triple'
AND m.label IN ('benzene', 'formaldehyde', 'acetaldehyde', 'ethylene oxide', 'vinyl chloride', 'chloroprene', '1,3-butadiene', 'benzidine', 'arsine', 'phosgene', 'dioxin', 'asbestos', 'radon', 'tobacco smoke', 'alcohol beverages', 'red meat', 'processed meat', 'ultraviolet radiation', 'X-rays', 'gamma rays', 'cosmic radiation', 'alpha particles', 'beta particles', 'neutrons', 'protons', 'heavy ions', 'microwave radiation', 'radiofrequency radiation', 'infrared radiation', 'visible light', 'low-frequency electromagnetic fields', ' ELF magnetic fields', 'ELF electric fields', 'static electric fields', 'static magnetic fields');
